name: Calcolatore Punto Pareggio
desc: Calcola Minimum price = (Fixed costs / Units) + Variable unit cost. Esempio: Fixed costs €5,000, 200 units, variable cost €15 = Minimum price = €40/unit. Calcolatore...

seo_description: Calcola Minimum price = (Fixed costs / Units) + Variable unit cost. Esempio: Fixed costs €5,000, 200 units, variable cost €15 = Minimum price = €40/unit. Calcol
example_label: Finding break-even units for product with €12,000 fixed costs, €85 price, and €52 variable cost.
result_context: Sell unita of {unità} to break even, generating facturacion of {facturacion}. Each unit contributes margen_contribucion of {margen_contribucion}.
formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)
steps: {'step': 3, 'description': 'Round up to whole units', 'calculation': '364 units needed'}
mistakes: Not accounting for step-fixed costs that change at certain volumes
Assuming variable costs remain constant at all production levels
Forgetting that break-even doesn't include desired profit margin
